zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Dauntsey III於大約1260年出生時，他的父親Richard de Dauntsey II32歲，母親Mabilia de Giffard22歲。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Dauntsey III于大约1260年出生时，他的父亲Richard de Dauntsey II32岁，母亲Mabilia de Giffard22岁。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Dauntsey III was born about 1260, his father, Richard de Dauntsey II, was 32 and his mother, Mabilia de Giffard, was 22. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Dauntsey III est né environ 1260, son père, Richard de Dauntsey II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mabilia de Giffard, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Dauntsey III um 1260 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Dauntsey II 32 und seine Mutter Mabilia de Giffard 22. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Dauntsey III è nato il circa 1260, il suo padre, Richard de Dauntsey II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mabilia de Giffard, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Dauntsey IIIが約1260年に生まれた時，父Richard de Dauntsey IIは32歳，母Mabilia de Giffardは22歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Dauntsey III(이)가 대략 1260년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Dauntsey II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabilia de Giffard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Dauntsey III nasceu aproximadamente 1260, seu pai, Richard de Dauntsey II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mabilia de Giffard, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Dauntsey III родился около 1260 г., его отцу по имени Richard de Dauntsey II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mabilia de Giffard, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Dauntsey III nació aproximadamente 1260, su papá, Richard de Dauntsey II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mabilia de Giffard, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
